reviews.review_description:
Fire game but it does need a few new things in my opinion

—————————————————————————————————

1. New Cosmetics
2. Friend Station
3. Make The Arm Length Smaller
4. Make The Jumpscares Scarier & Make It So You Dont Expect It
5. Make The Monsters Be Able To Hear You
6. Add A Thing To Make Custom Maps
7. Add A Nextbots Map

*disclaimer, im writing this in early versions so its still a fun game rn*

alright i’ve had this game since day 3 it came out and its REALLY scary. and i wanted to ask if you could make it more.. NOT dark because i cant see where im going. 

peak game tho

Got the game player models look good but that’s rlly it. Theres an option to join “floors” aka levels and if you want to be in a private you have to rejoin every time you join a floor. So when you’re actually playing the monster is faster than you and kills you at spawn 70% of the time. I played for 10 mins died 30+ times just by walking out of spawn 30 feet out. The first level you have to grab ballon’s and if you die good luck finding them😭. If you get rage baited easy by getting killed a lot do NOT play

The game is very fun especially with friends the monster on level one during the first 5 balloons is a nice warm up to the later levels that get harder I can say tho the game might not be a beginner friendly game so recommend to have some practice before going in but overall I love the gameplay and monsters especially the big blue gorilla on the last 5 balloons of level 1 overall I love this game
This game has many opportunities and levels to have great fun and scares. Probably the best vr game at the moment.

reviews.review_title: This is the BEST horror game on VR
reviews.review_description: This game is one of the best VR horror games. The only other good ones are big scary and scary baboon, so any other ones are a scam. Okay, now here's how they compare to each other. Fear you feel while playing: big scary > scary baboon: fever dream > scary baboon: big scary < fever dream. Okay, now enjoyment while playing the game: scary baboon > big scary: big scary < fever dream: scary baboon = fever dream. And finally, the world building: fever dream > big scary: scary baboon < fever dream: big scary < scary baboon. That's really all you need to know. Wait one more, and that's the amount of micro-transactions: big scary > scary baboon: fever dream > big scary: scary baboon < fever dream. And then one more price: scary baboon = big scary = fever dream: and that's really all you need to know. But this particular game shines in the horror aspect of well a horror game who could have guest. You know the game is good when you feel genuine fear when moving your stuby little arms as fast as you can to get away from whatever is chasing you.
The only problems i don't knos how to start a level and join a pub so it needs tutorial

It would be cool if there were a free play mode with no objective and a map like lethal ape or scary baboon where all the monsters are just roaming in an abandoned facility

The game is super fun and I enjoyed it alot but it was very hard. I wanted to go to a different level but I couldn't, it does make sense but the game would be more fun if you could go to different levels without having to complete level 1. The bone sound when you move your fingers is like asmr but after a while it starts to get annoying. The bad part in this game is when I tried to get my backpack I couldn't grab it. The  monster(pbnj) is very fast but I think that his ai is broken because when I hid in the bushes pbnj some how still got me. It is still very fun it's just pretty hard. In level 2 it is cool and terrifying when the monster disappears. The moon in level 1 is creepy and he kind of looks like he is silently studying us. I think that it would be a bit cool if the game had lore. In coulosion fever dream is really hard but it is super  fun.
Beat the level pb&j is annoying
